ops.text: Preserving the ccx-side NDCG benchmark driver: /tmp/ccx-fix-semble/benchmarks/baselines/ccx.py is UNTRACKED in the scratch semble clone (github.com/yasyf/semble fork, HEAD 2fc4ffc = v0.5.2-4-g2fc4ffc) and would be lost to a /tmp clean. It drives `ccx bench semsearch index/query` per repo (hardcoded _CCX=/tmp/ccx-bench/ccx, _CACHE_ROOT=/tmp/ccx-bench/cache via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA) and computes NDCG@5/@10 per query/category with benchmarks.metrics.ndcg_at_k, writing benchmarks/results/ccx-<semble-sha12>.json (resumable per repo). The 63 benchmark repos live at ~/.cache/semble-bench (verified present); queries+targets in /tmp/ccx-fix-semble/benchmarks/annotations/*.json (1251 total); repo pins in benchmarks/repos.json. Attached: the driver script.
